questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Identify the correct statement(s) of the following
options: Diamond and Zinc blende are isomorphs
Co-ordination number of oxide ion in corundum structure is 6.
Void fraction of bcc unit cell is 0.26
$\mathrm{ZnAl}_2 \mathrm{O}_4$ has spinel structure and $\mathrm{Al}^{3+}$ occupies octahedral void
questions.solution: Diamond and zinc blende have similar structure. $\mathrm{ZnAl}_2 \mathrm{O}_4$ has spinel structure. Co-ordination number of oxide ion in $\mathrm{Al}_2 \mathrm{O}_3$ is 4 and void fraction of bcc unit cell 0.32
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: LiF and NaBr are ionic salts that both form a face centred cubic lattice. The ionic radii of $\mathrm{Li}^{+}, \mathrm{F}^{-}$, $\mathrm{Na}^{+}$and $\mathrm{Br}^{-}$are $0.76,1.33,1.02$ and $1.96 \mathrm{~A}^0$ respectively, which of the following statement is / are true
options: The atomic radius of Na is smaller than $1.0 \mathrm{~A}^0$
The atomic radius of $F$ is smaller than $1.33 \mathrm{~A}^0$
Each $\mathrm{Li}^{+}$ion in LiF has $8 \mathrm{~F}^{-}$ions as nearest neighbors
The lattice energy of LiF is greater in magnitude than the lattice energy of NaBr
questions.solution: Radius of cation is smaller than parent atom and that of anion is more than parent atom
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Consider an ideal FCC crystal system, which is fully occupied by the particles $\mathrm{A}, \mathrm{B}$ and C , which are present at lattice points, octahedral voids and tetrahedral voids respectively. Identify the correct statement.
options: Particle B is surrounded by 8 particles of C at a distance approximately equal $\frac{\mathrm{a} \sqrt{3}}{4}$

Figure
represents one of the plane of symmetry

Figure
represents one of the plane of symmetry
$1^{\text {st }}$ nearest neighbour of particle $A$ is 8 particles of $C$ and $2^{\text {nd }}$ nearest neighbour is 6 particles of $B$
questions.solution:
O . V . is surrounded by $8 \mathrm{~T} . \mathrm{V}$.
One particle of A is surrounded by $8 \mathrm{~T} . \mathrm{V}$. and also surrounded by 6 O.V.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: For the ionic compound $\mathrm{A}_3 \mathrm{~B}$, which of the following statements are correct, if radii of $\mathrm{A}^{-}$and $\mathrm{B}^{3+}$ ion are respectively $5 x$ and $2 x$ and the lattice points have hcp arrangement?
options: $\frac{5}{6}$ th of tetrahedral voids are vacant
$\frac{1}{3}$ rd of total voids are vacant in compound
questions.solution:
Radius ratio $\left(\frac{\mathrm{r}^{+}}{\mathrm{r}^{-}}\right)=\frac{2 \mathrm{x}}{5 \mathrm{x}}=0.4$, coordination number of $\mathrm{B}^{3+} \Rightarrow 4$

Formula of the compound is $A_3 B$, i.e., $\frac{1}{6}$ th of tetrahedral sites are occupied by $\mathrm{B}^{3+}$ and so vacant tetrahedral sites are $\frac{5}{6}$ th.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
